name: Hil
text:
Tran Dong Hil
Date of Birth: 29/11/2005 | Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam | trandonghil.dev@gmail.com | +84 86-208-2750 |
github.com/hiltd2758
Professional Summary
Results-oriented Information Technology student equipped with a solid foundation in full-stack development (React, Spring
Boot, Docker). Driven to contribute technical skills in building scalable web applications and optimizing system workflows.
Committed to delivering high-quality code and supporting development teams in fast-paced environments.
Professional Experience
Academic & Team-Based Development Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Full-Stack Developer 2023 – Present
• Collaborated in Agile-like student teams to deliver full-stack solutions, actively participating in frontend UI design
and backend REST API integrations
• Applied industry-standard component-based architecture and responsive design patterns, ensuring cross-browser
compatibility and seamless user experiences
Education
University of Transport Ho Chi Minh City Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology | GPA: 3.36 / 4.00 2022 – Present (Expected: May 2027)
• Relevant Coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Database Systems, Software
Testing
Projects
Bloodline DNA Testing System | React, Spring Boot, Docker, GitHub Actions 2024 – 2025
• Developed a full-stack web application using React and Spring Boot to automate DNA testing workflows,
accelerating user registration and test booking processes
• Designed secure RESTful APIs via Spring Boot and implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) on the React
frontend to ensure data privacy across 3 distinct user roles
• Streamlined deployment processes by containerizing the application with Docker Compose and establishing a
CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions to automate regression testing
• Managed and tested APIs using Postman collections (492+ commits across the team)
• github.com/bloodline-system/...
TechMart B2C E-Commerce Platform | Java, Spring Boot, Docker, Microservices 2024 – 2025
• Engineered core microservices (Cart, Order, and Identity) using Spring Boot, participating in building a highly
available architecture with 10+ independent services
• Optimized inter-service communication utilizing Spring Cloud Eureka and API Gateway, configuring Docker
Compose to replicate production environments locally
• Documented and tested over 100 API endpoints using Postman; maintained API documentation in structured CSV
format for cross-team collaboration
• github.com/tinhonline262/techmart-b2c-ecommerce
AVL Tree Visualizer | HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Vanilla) 2024
• Constructed an interactive browser-based visualizer using Vanilla JavaScript and CSS Keyframes to demonstrate
complex AVL Tree operations, enhancing algorithm comprehension through real-time rendering
• Deployed as a live GitHub Pages demo: hiltd2758.github.io/avl visual
• github.com/hiltd2758/avl visual
Technical Skills
Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, HTML, CSS
Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Spring Boot, REST API
Tools & Platforms: Git, GitHub, Docker, Postman, VS Code, IntelliJ IDEA
CI/CD: GitHub Actions
